Judie, the anthro wolf girl of a famous athlete
Gerald, the lizard boy of a world class scientist
Timmie, the anthro horse kid of a politician
1.content:
"Sam, you are a genious!" said one of the anthro cats. He wore a black suit, a ski mask, and a flashlight. His partner in crime, who wore a similar outfit, smirked.

"I know, right, Henry?"

Both of them were standing in the middle of an abandoned warehouse, way outside the city, in the middle of a forest. It seemed the building was forgotten a long time ago, judging by the amount of dust and lack of stock. Hanry found it accidentally when he was searching for a location to hide their treasure they looted over the years: golden neclaces, jewels, all kind of stuff.

At first, the two criminals thought the warehouse was completely empty. As Sam looked around, using the weak light of the flashlight, he saw nothing but empty shelves, desks, and junk all over the floor.

"It's perfect!"

Henry nodded, and he took a step further into the darkness - until he found something big in the corner.

"What is it?" he asked, walking to the unusually big pile. It turned out was a big machine with a pointy edge, like a gigantic drill machine. He looked at the control panel, and just out of boredoom, he fiddled with the buttons.

Suddenly, the machine whirred up, and a red laser beam shot from its pointy end. It hit one of the boxes.

"What the hell are you doing?!" asked Sam.

"Sorry... Didn't know it was still operational!"

What happened next made both of the cats drop their jaw. The box shivered, trembled, and then suddenly grew up in size, to almost twice as big.

"Wooooaaaaaah!" said Henry. "It... just... grew!"

Sam licked his lips. "A... growth ray? Isn't that exist only in sci-fies?"

"Apparently not!" replied Henry. He pushed another button - this time a green laser beam shot from the machine, and made the box shrinking back to it's original size.

"Do you know what does it mean?!" asked Sam. "We can make our loot bigger!"

"That would be boring and simple! You know me, I don't like simple. Besides, selling so much gold in the black market can be problematic, we also have to find buyers. No, I have something more exciting in my mind," giggled Henry.

"Yeah..." asked Sam with some concern in his voice. "What is it?"

"You always said we should move from stealing to kidnapping... How about we kidnap some rich guy's kid, grow him bigger, and we refuse to shrink him back until we get a huge amount of money!"

"Why a kid?"

"Because they are hard to control!" Henry laughed. "Imagine the chaos they can cause even at regular size, and multiply it with a big number! It would be more spectacular than a bank heist!"

"Really?" asked Sam. He knew Henry from years, and he always had the wildest ideas. On the other hand, his ideas were usually bring tons upon tons of wealth tho the duo. "I don't know... Sounds dangerous..."

"Ah, don't be such a weakling!" Henry waved with his paw. "It's simple: get the child, grow him to like 10 or 20 feet tall, then release. The parents will practically beg us to change him back! When they pay, we shrink the kid back - and everyone is happy! Mostly us, and that's the point!" He smiled. "Besides... Imagine all the panic during the news! A giant child breaking havoc!" He laughed. "You know me, I love when we can see our work on television. The bigger the huss, the sweeter the money!"

Sam rubbed his neck. "I don't know... And who do you want to plan to kidnap?"
1.title: The plan

Alex grows massive!
11.content:
Alex, the 3 year old dragon child was playing in his room. His parents were out of town, doing some business, and they left the kid with a baby sitter, who was down in the kitchen at the moment.

They lived on the top of the hill, in a great mansion. The green scaled, quadrupedal anthro dragon boy sat in the middle of his room, which was bigger than most people's living room. He was holding a toy airplane between his fingers, pretending it was flying above the city, which was modeled beneath his feet. The details of the buildings were breathtaking - an exact replica of the nearby city.

Suddenly, the window opened, and two person in black clothes appeared.

"Hey kid!" asked one of them. Alex looked up, he was more curious than frightened.

"Hi, mister!" he waved with his tiny hand.

"Hey, hey..." the person stepped closer. "Would you like to see a cool toy?"

Alex twitched his ears. He loves toys! He nodded in agreement.

"Then follow us!"

He let the other person grab him, and pulled through the window. They escorted the child into a black van, where they offered him some candies. Alex grinned. These people were so nice!

"But I have to get back soon. Babysitter," said Alex.

The kidnappers nodded. "Don't worry, you will be back soon!"

Ten minutes later they arrived at the warehouse. They made Alex sit in a chair in front of the machine.

"How will we bring him back after this?" asked Sam.

"Don't worry. I stole a trailer while you were busy disarming the alarm," replied Henry. "Okay, kid, don't move... Here comes nothing!"
11.title: Alex, the dragon boy of a millionaire

choices: He grows just right there and then
He grows later in front of the babysitter
He won't grow until sleeptime
111.content:
The machine whirred up just like before, and a second later a red laser beam was shot, right into the dragon kid. Alex felt a tingling sensation, he giggled, and his frame glowed in red for a moment - and then the machine turned off.

"What happened?" asked Sam. He examined the kid, but he seemed unchanged. Same old height, about 2 feet tall.

"I don't know," answered Henry. He seemed just as confused. "It worked on the box."

"Should we shoot him again?"

"Yeah, it cannot hurt, I guess. Does it hurt, kid?"

Alex shook his head. "No, mister! It tickles!"

"Wanna have another tickle?"

Alex nodded. Henry turned back the machine again. This time he left the laser a bit longer hitting the child before he turned it off.

Again, the kid seemed to be the same.

"Ah, useless piece of cr..." said Henry, but Sam quickly replied, "Ssssh! The kid!"

Henry sighed. "Okay, child, let's bring you back to your room before someone starts to miss you. It seems we have to run more... experiments."

They brought back the child just as silently as they kidnapped him. Although as he was sitting in the lap of Sam, the anthro cat could have sworn that the dragon boy felt a bit heavier...

They pulled him back through his window.

"Here," said Sam, handing over a fluffy plush rabbit he bought earlier in order to keep the child calm. "A toy, just as I promised! And kid, if anyone asks: you didn't see us!"

Alex nodded, and he waved goodbye to the strange but kid friends.
111.title: Nothing happens (or so it seems)

choices: Pizza time! - Growth from consuming
The microwave's call - Growth from electricity
Unpredictable - Growth at a random times
1112.content:
Laura was always glad to help out Alex's family watching over their kid. Mostly because the paycheck was really high, she didn't have to do much with the young dragon, and the mansion was filled with expensive stuff to the brim. Swimming pool, cinema system, disco room, you name it.

Although Laura was generally a good hearted anthro vixen, she sometimes became a little selfish. Like enjoying the house instead of watching over the kid. She thought what the worse that can happen? The kid was 3 years old, he can take care of himself!

"Alex! Dinner is ready!" said Laura as she actually put the pizza she ordered in the microwave. She set it to 2 minutes, calling for the boy.

Alex climbed down, waving at her babysitter.

"Look! New toy!" he showed the bunny plush high above his head.

Laura of course couldn't recall all of the kid's toys.

"That's nice, honey. Sit down, and enjoy your meal!"

Alex's stomach growled loudly. He indeed felt hungry...
1112.title: He grows later in front of the babysitter

choices: He grows slightly
He grows a lot
He grows gigantic!
11122.content:
Alex did not want to sit down yet. Instead, he approached the microwave as Laura was taking care of the dishes. She forgot to clean the plates from yesterday, so he couldn't pay attention to Alex at the moment.

For the dragon the humming noise and the light was inviting. He always loved machines and all kind of stuff, just as every kid of his age. He stepped closer, looking up at the box. He saw it many occaisons of course, but this time it felt as it was calling him.

As the timer counted down to zero, blue sparks appeared around the metal box. Alex frowned. Unbeknownst to him, his scales also emitted a gentle light in a similar hue. He reached out, his fingers almost touched the door, when the counter reached zero and a ding was heard...

And right then the blue lights zapped into the child's body. Alex opened his mouth, feeling warmness spreading from his stomach. It did not hurt at all. On the contrary, it was a pleasuring feeling. He trembled gently, and his size started to increase...
11122.title: The microwave's call - Growth from electricity

choices: Later he grows again while watching TV with Laura
Later he grows again in his room alone
He does not grow further that day. But at night...
111221.content:
His previous size of 2 feet slowly inched bigger. It was at low pace - every time he took a breath his chest bulged, but it didn't get back as he exhaled. His legs stretched a bit further, his wagging tail reached a bit further, his head ascended a little higher, and overall, his entire frame grew in proportion. He gained one extra inch at first, then two more, and again, until he reached his new size of 2 and a half feet.

"I'm right there," said Laura, still focusing on the plates.

Alex tilted his head, trying to figure out what changed. He wasn't sure; it seemed like he stood on the first step of the stairs, except he didn't. Eventually he shrugged, and sat on his place. The chair seemed a bit smaller.

"As I said, dinner is ready!" said Laura, and finally she turned around. She stared at the kid for a brief moment, wondering what was different about him, then shook her head, and served the pizza.

"Buon appetito!" winked the babysitter, and they eat the pizza in silence.
111221.title: He grows slightly

choices: Oddly, his growth remains undiscovered
Laura hears the noice and checks on Alex
1112212.content:
"Okay, that's it for you!" said Laura, grabbing the last slice. "I eat this for you. Don't stuff too much of this stuff into you, I can tell you already look bigger. Too much spurt can be harmful at your age."

"Bigger?" asked Alex. He waved his legs under the table. He always wanted to grow bigger, just like his parents, or any adult for that matter. He looked at himself. Maybe he indeed grew bigger since yesterday!

For the rest of the day Laura disappeared in one of the many entertainment rooms of the mansion. She knew that Alex went back to his room, and turned on the TV. His favorite cartoon was up, so at this time the young dragon did not require any babysitting.

As Alex was sitting in the couch, enjoying the show where a dog grew bigger by accident, the blue sparks appeared again, this time around the television. Alex did not pay attention to them, he simply watched the cartoon.

"Bigger!" he yelled at the screen, and got up, stepping closer. "Grow bigger, Rex! You can do it!" He started jumping up and down. His scales glowed again, matching in color with the strange sparks, when all of a sudden they hit the kid again.

This time the warmness spread stronger, faster. The dragon surged up with bigger speed, quickly reaching 3 feet in height, then 4 feet. He wondered why he had to tilt his head lower and lower just to see the screen properly. His bulging tail knocked over some toys, his paws sank deeper into the carpet. Sparks flew between his toes as another spurt attacked, blowing the child to 5 feet, then 6 feet tall. He was already as tall as Laura, and the strange power continued to flow into him, until it stopped - leaving the kid at an astonishing height of 7 feet.

This time Alex realized what just happened. His eyes widened open. He grew! He really became as big as the adults! His jumps of joy caused an audible thud.
1112212.title: Later he grows again in his room alone

choices: Laura hears a strange noise during the night
At morning he checks on Alex, but strangely she cannot open the door
At night Alex climbs out the window and wanders off
11122121.content:
Alex enjoyed his new size, and he played with all of his different toys. They seemed so much smaller now. Especially the model city, which was already pretty small to scale. He tried to grab a building, but it simply snapped half between his fingers.

"Woah!" said the dragon in awe. He also had to careful as he turned around, not to knock down everything. The most difficult part was controlling his tail. Since he had no eyes on it, and he couldn't feel its size yet, he constantly hit it to the shelves, desk, or the walls.

The night fall, and Laura knocked on Alex's door.

"Hey kid! Bath time!Then sleep!"

Alex yawned. He wanted to show his new size to Laura, but he suddenly felt drowsy. "Feel sleepy! Let's bath in the morning!"

"Are you sure? Okay, you knows! Are you hungry? Need anything?"

Alex shook his big head. "Just a big, big blanket..."

"Funny, kiddo! Okay, sleep tight! I will sleep in my usual room nearby if you want a glass of water or something." With that, Laura went back to play some computer games with her friends.
11122121.title: Oddly, his growth remains undiscovered

choices: Eventually she manages to open it
A massive paw breaks through
The entire house rumbles - Alex was still growing!
111221212.content:
Alex found his bed a few sizes small, which made him chuckle. Still he climbed into it. The furniture moaned under the weight, it was not designed to witstand such a big person. He tried to cover himself with a blanket, but it couldn't cover his entire body. After a few minutes he decided his stomach is enough to be covered, and left his limbs and tail out. The tail couldn't even fit on the bed, and curled down, and the tip rested on the floor near the wall. He fall asleep quickly.

Hours passed, even Laura went to bed. Alex dreamed all kind of dreams, almost all of them containing giants and growth. He smiled in his bed, and his tail started wag. Unfortunately, the tip moved dangerously close to an electric socket, which triggered the blue sparks once again. They jumped onto his tail, and from that the glow crawled up and engulfed his body. He started to grow again, faster than before. His legs stretched and crawled down to the floor, his head banged into the wall, pushing the growing child further away. With 10 feet of height he already broke world records, and it seemed his growth only sped up from there. After a few minutes the bed collapsed under the weight, but even that sound didn't wake up Alex. He turned around in his sleep, and placed a paw at the wall, not realizing that his hindlegs slowly crawled across the room, breaking toys and models on its way...

In the morning, Laura sat up. She stretched, and smiled by the thought of all the cool things she will do that day. But of course she had to check on Alex first. Making a bath, and then a breakfast, probably play with him a little.

After making her presentable she walked down the corridor leading to Alex's room.

"Kiddo! Are you awake?"

A deep rumble was her answer. it sounded like a cave troll.

"Wakey-wakey!" she knocked on the door, which seemed odd by the look of it. It seemed like it was bending slightly outwards. "Gah, old piece of wood, cannot withstand the moisture!" Then she tried to open it.

It was stuck. Since when Alex had locks on his door? No, the door must be bend too much. But why? As far as she knew yesterday it was completely fine!
111221212.title: At morning he checks on Alex, but strangely she...

choices: No electricity at home, Laura drives off to get help
Laura calls the ambulance
The parents arrive home early
1112212122.content:
Laura heard a low rumble coming from the room. Her face turned to pale as she imagined all kind of things. Something happened! Maybe an attack? Burglars? The TV exploded? She was worrying about the kid.

But what happened next surpassed his every nightmare. The door bent further, until it smashed into splinters. And right behind that was the biggest paw Laura had ever seen. From heel to toes it was as tall as herself, nearly 6 feet long. The toes themselves, as big as her head, were at the top of the door frame, and the claws probably scratched the inner surface of the wall above that. The leg that it belonged to stretched into the room, but Laura could not see the scene properly. The giant dragon sole covered most of her vision.

"A... A.. lx...?" she shrieked.

Again, a deep growl was her answer.

"What... Is it already mornin'?" asked a voice that reminded her to Alex, yet it sounded like something coming from a tunnel.

"A... Alex...! You are... You're... you're..." The babysitter shivered, she was close to faint. Before her eyes laid the biggest kid, no, the biggest person, no, probably the biggest creature ever! How big he can be? And how did he grew?

The dragon boy slowly sat up, or at least that was his plan. He hit his head into the ceiling immediately, only to fall back on his back, bringing most of the plaster down.

Laura gulped, and she squeezed herself into he room.
1112212122.title: A massive paw breaks through

choices: Laura drives to her sister, she is the clever one in the family
Laura calls the parents at a phone booth
Alex manages to climb out. Freedom!
11122121221.content:
"What.. happened... to you?" Laura kept asking. She couldn't believe what she saw. It was like a strange dream, or rather nightmare. But it felt so real. He even punched her own arm to make sure it is real.

Alex looked around. He was squeezed into a tiny box, which he recognized to be his room. There was no wall he didn't touch at the moment: his head poke a hole on one, his hind legs were at the further side, and her underdeveloped wings bent up on the others. His tail smashed the town model completely, and rested there in a curled up position.

"Ugh... Laura...? It seems I stuck..."

"I... see..." she panted heavily. What should she do, what should she do?! She grabbed her cellphone, remembering the emergency numbers the parents provided. But the phone was dead. She could swear she recharged it last night!

She jumped to the nearest phone on the wall. No signal.

"Be right back!" she said. "Don't go anywhere!"

"Can't," replied Alex. He fidgeted a bit, but he only managed to create more cracks and bring down more plaster.

Laura ran out of the room, and looked around the house. There was no electricity at all. She ran into the basement to check the fuses. All of them were melted.

"What the heck happened here?!" She panicked. She had no better idea but to get into her car and get help. Who she should search for anyway? The doctors? The police? The firefighters? 911? They would all just laugh at her! But it did not matter, she had to do something!
11122121221.title: No electricity at home, Laura drives off to get...

choices: Alex runs into some police officers
One of Alex's friends notices him first
The transmission towers look so interesting!
111221212213.content:
Alex heard Laura drive off.

"She left me alone. Mum said she should never leave me out of sight!" The giant kid bit his lips, and collected all his strength. Maybe he can break the wall leading to the garden. He moved his leg, trying to knock the wall with his knee. There was little room to move, but each time he punched it, bigger and bigger pieces fall out. With one of his wings he managed to break the window, which miraculously survived his latest growth.

Little by little he worked himself toward his freedom, after finally the wall collapsed.

"Yu-hu!" cheered the giant boy, and he crawled out. Luckily his room was on the ground level, not that a fall from a few feet would count match.

Once he was finally outside, he managed to stretch to his full height. All 30 feet of it. He turned around, and surprised that his eye was leveling with the third floor windows. His paws stomped on the bushes like they were glass blades, and his back spikes reached the bottom of the canopy of a nearby ash tree.

"Big!" smiled the dragon boy. Once he got out all of his worries flew away, filling him with joy. "I am finally big!" He quickly forget about Laura and her clear instruction to stay, and turned away from the house. The brick fence of the estate reached only his knees.

"I am going on an adventure!" he recited one of his favorite movies, and he stepped over the fence. Every step caused a small tremor, making pebbles dancing and jumping around.
111221212213.title: Alex manages to climb out. Freedom!

choices: The operator laughs at them
Agents of the goverment arrives - they take over the situation
Alex leaves them behind and moves toward the city
1112212122131.content:
The two police officers smoke outside their car, watching the empty roads.

"I don't know what we are doing here," said the first, an anthro lion. His partner, a smaller squirrel, shrugged. "We are here because the chief ordered us here. To catch speeders."

The lion officer looked around with a snarl. No vehicles in that direction. He turned his head. Nothing on that direction either.

"Yeah. Speeders. I'm still saying that we should pack up and go back to the city before we die of boredom. I know a good bagel shop..."

The squirrels shook his head, and wanted to reply with something snappy, when he something suddenly interrupted.

"Did you hear that?"

"Hear what?"

A quite thud. A slight tremor. The noise of tree crown movements, without a single breeze to feel.

"Something is in the forest," said the squirrel. At first the lion wanted to reprehend his partner, but then he felt it too.

"Maybe a wild animal. Quick, your taser gun!" said the lion. The next moment, the trees bent, and a giant creature appeared.

"Hi there!" Alex waved with his front paw. Cool, small people! Maybe they can play together!

The officers dropped their mouth. The lion blinked rapidly, the squirrel shivered in fear. A 30 feet tall dragon was far from they expected, but who could blame them.

"Do you want to play?" asked Alex with a gentle smile, and he stepped closer. The squirrel was so horrified he acted without thinking. He shot the giant boy's leg with his taser. Thousands of volts hit the dragon, who found it tickling. To the officers further astonishment, the wires started to grow in a blue hue, followed by the giant dragon's scale.

Alex quaked, and welcomed the warmness spreading again. He was no longer a 30 feet tall dragon, but a 35 one, from where he surged up to 40 feet before the taser ran out of juice. "That felt good!" Alex said.

"Did he just... Grow?" whispered the lion.

The squirrel nodded, and with a shaking hand, he called the headquarters.

"We need reinforcement..."
1112212122131.title: Alex runs into some police officers

choices: Uh-oh! High voltage transmission towers on the way!
They arrive at base without any problem
Meanwhile at Laura...
11122121221312.content:
Alex sat down with a thud. His rear sank a few feet deep into the ground, his hind paw rested near the car. If he wanted he could easily press the vehicle into a pancake of metal. But he did not want to do that, at least not yet.

"Let's play hide and seek!" he suggested. The officers were still in shock, yet somehow the squirrel managed to explain the situation without sounding silly or drugged. It was one of his biggest achievement in life.

"Let's not," said the lion once he found his voice. "Gee, kid, you are a big one! Are you on vitamins?"

"I eat whatever by babysitter gives me," replied the giant kid. "Except spinach. I hate spinach."

"Yeah, but they say it helps you gr... Ah, never mind."

A good twenty minutes later a caravan of black vehicles approached. The officers sighed, the reinforcement arrived. Except they didn't belong to the police station. They were unmarked vehicles with painted windows: jeeps, SUVs, and a long trailer they usually use to move industrial chimneys.

They stopped right before the officers. A bull, wearing sunglasses and general officer markings on his shoulder, stepped closer.

"General X, from the MXY-7 distribution," he said with a resigned voice. He only took a glance at the giant kid behind, but his face remained still. "In the name of the country we take over of the situation. You are dismissed, and from now what you witnessed falls into the state of Confidental Information, which you break shall be considered as treason against the nation."

"He-he, funny words!" giggled Alex. He was curious about the cars. He always love toys around him!

"We already had video footage of the creature from our satellites," General X continued, "but we missed live confirmation... Thank you for your service." Then he stopped for a moment, mumbling to himself. "In live he seems even bigger..."

"What?" asked the squirrel who was a bit simpler in mind.

"He gently send us to hell," explained the lion. "Because we discovered some military secret. I bet you experimented with some growth ray, eh? I watch movies, you know!"

"The existence of such a device is classified and denied."

Meanwhile the other agents surrounded the giant kid. They approached gently, and tried to behave friendly and sympathetic. It worked, Alex slowly stood up, and only a few people recoiled by his size.

"Alex is your name, right?" said one of them with a sweet tone. "Your trace shows us where you came from!"

"Yes, but I don't want to go back!" nodded Alex.

"You don't need to. Come, lay down on this... Car," he pointed at the trailer. "We bring you to a really interesting place! A giant hangar with full of toys!"

"Yeeeey!" cheered the giant dragon, and his tail knocked the police car over. As the officers slapped their head, Alex slowly and carefully laid on the trailer. He already imagined it will be like sled, which he enjoyed during wintertime!
11122121221312.title: Agents of the goverment arrives - they take ove...

choices: The gigantic Alex sees the city in the distance
A strange building grabs his attention. A power plant!
The agents are still able to lure them into the base secretly
111221212213121.content:
Just as Alex suspected, the ride was enjoyable. Although they were driving with a slow speed, he still felt the headwind tickling his cheeks. They tied him down by the legs and tail, for 'safety reasons'.

"They are like seatbelts," explained the general. Alex nodded, he knew those. Mum always told him to buckle up right after he enters the car.

"Cover him up, we approach to populated area," ordered the general after half an hour of driving. "Sorry, kid, we... blind your sight. Is it okay with you? It's a... game."

Alex nodded again. He never says no to a game! They pulled out a giant, black tarp, which covered almost all of his body. Only the tip of the tail sneaked out, but they couldn't do much about it.

"We say it's a decorative statue if anyone asks," said the general to his men.

They traveled further. Alex saw nothing but blackness, only the bumps of the road told him what speed they were going at.

"This is boring," he thought. He wanted to say that he might want to get up, when something strange happened. His stomach growled, and the warmness awakened inside him.

The caravan arrived at a junction where a line of high voltage transmission towers stood. As they turned parallel to the lines, above their heads the wires started to glow in blue. Under the tarp a slight glowing became visible too.

"What is going on," said the general while the caravan was still going. Suddenly, a lightning bolt struck from the towers, right into the tarp, then again, and again... A rumbling noise filled the air.

Limbs exploded from the sides; the chains and ropes snapped immediately. The tail widened and grew like a balloon on an industrial air compressor, hitting the car behind the trailer. The dragon's head hit the SUV in the front, making it slide down the road.

"Leave! He's growing bigger!" said the general in panic, showing any emotions the first time. Alex, who already reached 70 feet if he would stand up, tensed all his muscles, only to hit by another lightning, and with that a growth spurt to 100 feet. Vehicles collapsed to each other, panicking agents flee for their lives, and they could do nothing but watch the kid growing to 130 feet... 150 feet... 200 feet... First his toes grew to person size, then his toe-claws; the legs became thicker than mammoth trees, and the size of the tail could be leveled with a building. The wings could be compared to circus tents.

The trailer gave up a long time ago, and quickly the entire caravan followed, all of them laid under the huge body of the gigantic dragon kid. His wings hit the towers, making them collapse, which finally broke the electric powers. Yet a few more growth spurt remained inside him. Remnant sparks ran across his body, made him shiver and provided a few more feet in height, before all of that faded, leaving Alex at 250 feet in height.

"I just wanted to stretch my limbs," said Alex, feeling a bit guilty, as he was the cause of his gigantification. "Sorry."
111221212213121.title: Uh-oh! High voltage transmission towers on the ...

choices: They pay the ransom. Time to catch up with a hill sized kid!
A destroyed bank cannot send any confirmation...
1112212122131211.content:
Alex slowly stood up, making his new size even more astonishing. His brain had troubles processing the sudden size change - for the kid, people were not people anymore but dolls, cars were mere toys, and he thought all around him was the biggest play room ever.

"Cool!" he said with a much deeper and booming voice. "You really brought me to an interesting place! Hello? Anyone here?"

The agents, who still tried to recover from the shock, now shout out to the kid and waved to catch his attention, but it was useless.

The dragon child, who competed with a 25 story high office tower, marched forward, following the road which stretched between his feet. Each step quaked the earth and left 50 feet long and 10 feet deep paw prints behind, a size of a decent swimming pool.

"Is that a model city there?" he tilted his head, staring at the horizon.

"Give me the phone!" ordered the general, but then he blinked at the device uncomprehendingly. The cells were dead.

=====================================

It didn't take much time until phone calls flooded the emergency lines. What first sounded as a prank call made the people more and more nervous, as all of them reported the same thing: a gigantic, utterly enormous giant dragon was walking the road, approaching the great city of New Ershine. When the first cameramen appeared at the scene, even the most professional reporters quivered when they showed the massive sight in the distance.

"Just around at 10am this day a giant creature appeared at the crossing of Road 41 and Tinse," said the reporter with a shivering voice. "As you can see, the creature resembles a dragon youngling... Uh... Officers tried to establish a communication, but they have a hard time keeping up with the child, whose walking speed is over 120 miles per hour... They try to identify the creature; so far the most popular theories are that the giant is a member of an alien race or an awakened ancient creature. The government did not gave an official report yet, but they ask all civil person to stay away from the creature, stay home, and watch for further instructions. We are Channel 4 bring you all the news, so stay tuned..."

"Wow," said Sam, the anthro cat who kidnapped Alex in the first place. "Just... wow."

"This is fantastic!" replied his criminal partner Henry. Both of them sat in the abandoned warehouse, watching a stolen TV. They were surrounded by treasures of all sizes: a golden necklace as big as a coffee table, a ring that was slightly bigger than a dining plate, a car sized diamond earring, and so on. They were sitting on a gold bar big enough to function as a couch. In the background, the growth ray was smoking due to the overheat.

"I mean, look at him!" said Henry. "Our plan worked after all! And here we thought only inanimate objects can be enlarged!"

"So... now what?" asked Sam, but he already knew the answer.

"It's simple! We call the parents in a secured line, explain them the situation, and they have to transfer one million dollars to our bank account! Or make it one billion... How much damage did he already cause?"

"More than enough," said Sam. He started to dislike this plan. A 250 feet tall child?! That does not cause minor damage, that pushes the country into chaos!

"I make the call. In the meantime we need to prepare to mount the growth ray into the trailer. As soon as we got the confirmation from the bank, we leave, and shrink their little baby back."

"Yeah... little... funny..." chuckled in a completely non-funny tone.
1112212122131211.title: The gigantic Alex sees the city in the distance

choices: Time to see the city central!
Alex feels guilty for causing so much damage, he heads toward the mountains
The military brings in their own size ray
11122121221312112.content:
The suburban area was the first Alex reached. He was in awe due to his surroundings. Back in his room he though his model city was extremely detailed, but here, everything was beyond his wildest dream. Not just that even the trees had lifelike leaves, and every crack seemed different on the concrete road, but there was a ton on animatronic dolls moving around him. When he lifted one up to examine it, it started to wiggle so widely that Alex eventually put it back. He did not want to break these toys. Strangely, after this move all the other animatronics moved further from the kid.

He continued his walk, using only the roads to place his paws onto. Still, the pavement cracked under his weight. Alex didn't want to cause any harm, but he was too curious to see the model city from the inside.

Ha stood in the middle of a parking lot, and laid down to bring his head closer to one of the houses. His giant eyeball, 10 feet in diameter, filled the entire window. The gazelle girl screamed, then fainted when she looked into the big blue iris.

"Cool," chuckled the giant kid. Then he moved to the next house, and grabbed its roof with a single paw. Back at home, all of the houses had detachable roofs, and he suspected here it's the same.

An entire family of mice hid under the dining table as the walls cracked and the ceiling ascended into the air. They shivered widely, holding each other's hand as a warm breath filled the room, followed by some smoke coming from a 3 feet wide nostril.

"Even the details of the interior are so good!" they heard the giant dragon's voice shaking the windows.

Finally, some of the officers arrived with a megaphone. By this time they figured out the identity of the kid, but the origin of his gigantification remained a mystery, as the kidnappers warned the parents not to reveal their crime.

"Alex! Alex!"

The dragon child stood up and looked around. Did someone called him?

"Alex! Officer Brandon is here! Everything is all right! We contacted with your parents! They worry, but they are okay! Soon everything will be okay, I promise!"

Alex blinked. "Why wouldn't be? I just got the coolest room ever!" He didn't see anyone, and that bothered him. If there was an adult around, he better show himself. Otherwise he assume it's just the prank of some other kid who wants to get rid of him and play in this awesome room!

Since no one appeared, he assumed the latter.

"If you excuse me," said Alex with a slightly annoyed tone, "I want to look around!"

He left the suburban area and the officers behind, and moved toward the bigger part of the city, where taller buildings and wider streets awaited him. News choppers buzzed around his head, but just out of his reach to avoid the danger. Police cars escorted parallel to the streets he was using - one lane for the left side, one lane for the right side -, while civil cars drove as far as they could in the opposite direction.

The first bigger building, a 5 story high brick and glass construction was unfortunately the very same bank the kidnappers used for their shady transactions, including the ransom they were waiting for. The building itself barely reached the knees of the child. It wasn't that interesting, and Alex would have just passed by, if there hadn't been some power lines nearby, which was the main source of electricity of the aformentioned suburban area. As Alex's hips gently touched the wires, they started to glow in blue in synchron with his scales, and lightning bolts struck his side.

Alex stopped. The familiar feeling filled him again. He did not really know its meaning, but he enjoyed the tingling sensation. It was as pleasurable as a back rub. The child closed his eyes, and with a soft purr he let the energies flow.

"Do you... see that...?!" asked one of the news reporter. He and dozens of people around watched in awe as the already gigantic child started to grow bigger. Through the broadcast, the entire world witnessed his latest growth spurt, which brought him to even bigger heights. Spurt after spurt his paws swelled longer and wider, the toes ploughed up the pavement, while the heels sank deeper and further in the opposite direction. His legs stretched like a bread during its baking but on high-speed camera. His tail, which was already as long as a commercial aircraft started to transform into a blimp. It curled and whipped, and due to the unfortunate circumstances, the tip smashed right into the walls of the bank.

Due to the emergency, all transactions were hold. They evacuated the building immediately. People ran out just before the entire structure quaked and crumbled into a pile of bricks, glass shards and debris.

But it wasn't the only building that suffered from damage. As the gigantic child reached 300 feet in height, his front paw on the left sank into the side of the street shops. People gasped and ran in fright from the giant pawside that stretched so vast they crushed through more than one story. At 350 feet his shoulder hit a water tower, which sent tons upon tons of water down below on its collapse. At 400 feet, his hips started to squeeze buildings on both side of the street. Metal moaned, pillars groaned, plaster fell all around the growing dragon. His toe-claws flattened the parking cars just by crawling on top of them; his wings scratched the higher levels, breaking windows around... Everyone was wondering when the next building will collapse, when finally, after some minutes that felt hours, the massive child stopped growing at 500 feet.

He officially became a living skyscraper.
11122121221312112.title: A destroyed bank cannot send any confirmation...

choices: Alex bumps into a nuclear power plant!
The military's secret base is in the mountains
111221212213121122.content:
When Alex opened his eyes, everything seemed different, again. He was still in the magical play room, but it seemed during his short burst pleasure, someone changed all the models to half their sizes.

"Oh, wow. I guess I broke a few things," said the dragon to himself, but of course everyone heard him in the district. People shouted at him through megaphones, asking or begging him, but he simply ignored them. As long as there are no adults around, he is his own boss. And he didn't want some kid to tell him to go away!

"Although I might get into trouble because of this," he said, leaning closer to the street. He examined all the destruction, cracks, breaks and collapsed structures, including the unfortunate bank from before.

"Yep. Definitely broken." He grabbed the pile of debris, and shoveled it into a bigger mound. Then he poked holes with his toe-fingers all around. When he finished, he checked out his work with a tilted head.

"There you go, windows and everything. As good as new!" He sighed, making a few trees lean. "I guess I leave now. This is just too small, can't see the details anymore. Maybe there are bigger scaled models around!"

Everyone sighed in relief hearing those words. They already started to evacuate the city, but it would have been impossible to move the citizens into safety with the gigantic dragon so close.

However, the next movement of the kid gave everyone freaking out. He turned around.

The already tormented - but luckily emptied - buildings that were squeezed between his hips finally gave up and collapsed. His massive tail brought down the next line of houses, and his paws smashed everything beneath, including the roads, some more cars, an entire bus, a phone booth, and dozens of motorcycles. When they lifted his leg up, only the plates of metal remained in the bottom of the paw prints.

With such a simple movement he increased his damage tenfold comparing to his previous actions.

"I guess I visit the mountains," mumbled the dragon, "Those are big enough, right?"

=====================================

"Still nothing," said Sam, checking his phone every minute. The two criminals sat back on their gold bar couch, and watched the television. When the child started to grow bigger on the screen, and they couldn't hear the reporter's scared words due to the rumbling noise, Sam blinked0 0nervously, while Henry laughed loudly.

"Fantastic! Do you think it's because we shot him twice?"

"Probably. Who knows?" asked Sam. He wiped the sweat from his forehead. "If he grew without a direct shot from the machine... Do you think he will grow bigger?" He gulped. "And bigger... And bigger...?"

"It's a possibility, yes. And do you know what's the best part? Everyone else thinks the same!" Henry giggled, enjoying the 'show' unfolding on the screen.

"And why is that?"

"Because the parents have truly no choice but to pay! Each minute they hesitate they risk to create an even bigger catastrophe!"

"So... why didn't they pay yet?" asked Sam, checking his phone again. Still nothing, not a single e-mail or SMS.

"Because rich parents are jerks! They always want to cross the criminals by working together with the police. Have you not seen any movies in the topic?"

Sam nodded, but he doubted this would be the same case here.
111221212213121122.title: Alex feels guilty for causing so much damage, h...

choices: They finally figure out his trigger - time to work on a solution!
Sam had enough, he's on his way to Alex with the size ray
Henry wants to grow just as big, if not bigger!
1112212122131211221.content:
Alex managed to pass the suburban area, with slightly more damage than before. He only stomped on a few houses, and reshaped some gardens into paw print shaped holes. The roads and the wide area between the houses suffered the most, the concrete disappeared completely, together with everything else: pathways, bins, light poles, vehicles and even trees.

Once he managed to leave the city behind, he headed north, where mountains occupied the view. "I wonder if they are as detailed as the city!" he said.

It was quite difficult to follow the gigantic kid even when roads were around, but now he moved through a wilder area. Corn fields came across, then a forest, which reminded Alex walking on a soft carpet. It even tickled him a little. When a river came across, he leaned down, and licked up the water, together with an entire school of fish without noticing. His 40 feet long tongue carved out even the rocks and the bed of the river, making it deeper than originally.

Only the choppers and airplanes were fast enough to keep up with the child, who moved with 200 miles per hour just by walking normally. They were all followed him from a distance, so even in the unfortunate event of another growth they can escape.

One particular police chopper was approaching closer than the others.

"Alex!" said a familiar voice seemingly out of nowhere. The giant child stopped, looking for the source. Maybe it is between the trees?

"Alex, it's me, mommy..."

"Mommy!" The giant child jumped up and down, causing earthquakes and a small rock avalanche coming from the nearby mound.

"Calm down, sweetheart! I'm... Khm, I'm on the phone now, so you can't see me. Can you... Stop, and sit down?"

With a loud thud Alex sat, creating a new clearing the middle of a birch forest. He stretched out his limbs, crawling up more trees. His paw alone loomed over the canopies, as he wriggled his toes they tickled him.

"Good boy! I want to... Stay there for a while. Until... Uhm... So, for a while."

"Where are you, mommy?" asked the kid looking around.

"I'm not around, I told you, I speak through, uhm, the phone!"

"But I'm not using the phone," replied Alex. "Ah, I know! Is this a hide and seek game? Are you in this room, mommy?"

"No, Alex, I told..."

The gigantic child stood up, and stretched his limbs. "I'm gonna find you!"

With that, he galloped toward the mountains, guessing that mom can be behind them. Even the choppers couldn't keep up with his increased speed anymore, and the earth quaked more intense with each step he made through the countryside.

A few minutes later he arrived at the foot of the mountains. He tilted his head back, looking up the mighty structure.

"Woah. They are big!" Alex nodded in awe. It reminded him the time they went to a hike with his family. They climbed up a mountain, not to the top of course, but still. Although those mountains were a lot bigger than these!

"Maybe I can climb these..."

The first formation of the range of peaks stood about half a mile tall. Impressive size on its own, but not to Alex, who was only a fifth of its size. A simple climb even for a 3 years old, especially when someone was a dragon, with strong legs and claws in his repertoire.

He placed his paw against the rocks, and marveled how easily he was able to dig his claws into it. With a few more moves he was already approaching the first peak. A minute later his head appeared above the mountain.

Then he saw something on the other side. It was not his mother as he initially hoped, but something more interesting. And unbeknownst to him, a more dangerous thing.

The Countryside Nuclear Power Plant.

The sirens already filled the air. An entire group of the staff worked hard on turning off the reactors as soon as they got the news that the giant was approaching. But it's not like the flick of a light switch. There was a careful procedure, which they had to follow through, and it took time.

Too much time.

"Oh, what is this?" asked Alex noticing the building immediately. It had wide chimneys and a bunch of other facilities around, including a set of high voltage wires that fed the nearby cities.

"Evacuate! Evacuate!" a machine voice announced constantly.

The giant stepped over the peak, looming over the facility. His shadow alone filled the entire power plant. The cooling towers, the tallest structure around, could not reach his belly. Still their size was respectable even for Alex, who stepped closer. The 'animatronics' ran into the tiny cars and buses, and drove into the safety tunnels.

No one was around when the giant kid brought his head closer to the power plant. Thus no one witnessed when the reactor core heated up and glowed in blue, just like the dragon's skin did a second later. Together they lighted up the surrounding valley. A buzzing sound filled the air, and Alex giggled as the pleasure returned again.

Then the strongest lightning mankind ever created struck the child. Alex hiccuped as he not just grew but exploded in size, doubling right there in just a few seconds to 1000 feet. His paws ploughed most part of the valley even deeper, and his tail curled up on the side of the mountain behind him. The gargantuan kid tensed all his muscles, making him growl before the next spurt hit, doubling his fantastic size once again. The cooling towers, once a tribute to anthrokind in science, were dwarfed by a single paw approaching with the speed of a train. The toes crushed through the concrete structures as they were only glass blades. The ground sank deeper under the utter weight of the ever-growing child. Alex growled as the once gentle feeling became stronger. Another lightning struck, sending him all the way up to 5000 feet. By this time the entire facility vanished under his mighty, thousand feet long soles. His sides bulged closer to the mountains, his tail curled over the peak he climbed through a minute ago. Alex took a deep breath, thinking that the strange feeling was over... But a last strike from the core hit him before it turned into ashes, making him doubling his size yet again.

The 2 mile tall child's head smashed through the lower clouds. Only a few of the peaks towered over them, but there was no mountain on the planet he couldn't climb anymore.
1112212122131211221.title: Alex bumps into a nuclear power plant!

choices: They find the other growth ray
They find the kidnappers
11122121221312112211.content:
Many people gathered around the round table of the Operation Room, located at Fort Werington, deep hundreds of feet underground. The building was usually filled with officers and scientists to discuss the result of the latest experiments conducted within the military facility. But this exceptional time civilians attended as well at the discretion of the Secretary of Defense: guest professors, hobby geniuses, politicians, Alex's parents, and even Laura, the babysitter. All of them had to fill out the necessary papers to enter the top secret facility. The parents and the babysitter were questioned about the details of the incident, what they saw, who did they talked to, and so on. Laura's interrogation went on for nearly an hour.

At this moment, they were watching the numerous monitors of satellite images, photos, news broadcast, charts and excel tables, while arguing with each other with increasing volume. The parents held hands, staring with a frightened face at their little boy, who grew up way bigger than they had ever imagined. Laura constantly bit her lips, her eyes bulged out, and she took breath irregularly.

A short scientist, a meerkat with glasses and white coat, stood up in the middle of the table. "Silence!" He hold up a hand. Everyone looked at him, and finally, the noise ceased in the large room. "Okay, here are the facts we know. Unknown person or persons contacted with the parents, claiming they are responsible for the enlargement of Subject A. They claim a ransom equal in amount of the official damage he caused, which is currently at 10.3 billion dollars, including the New Ershine Incident and the entire destruction of the Countryside Nuclear Power Plant. We do not know if they are capable of shrinking back Subject A, but it doesn't matter, since no further contact had been made with these people. Our best agents are working on finding them, but so far with no result."

Many people gasped, the mother sobbed quietly. The scientist continued: "As for the enlargement process, our researchers found some documents buried deep in the archives of this very facility: there are clear signs that a person named Professor Lingen worked on a size changing device, contracted by the military."

The noise level uproared again, people were yelling at each other and interrupting their excuses. The meerkat cleared his throat.

"However, it seems that the project was abandoned and Professor Lingen was fired. His laboratory, set on an unidentified location, was emptied. The faith of the device is unknown. We do not know the cause of the project's closure for sure, but we found some reports on the initial results. These documents suggest that there were problems with the enlargement of living tissues, especially around the failure of the limit regulators. They mention one particular animal subject, a caterpillar, who grew uncontrollably, namely in the present of... Electricity."

The people started to argue again. "It makes sense now!", "So that's what the kidnappers found!", "It's all the military's fault, they toying with the forces of nature again!"

"Gentlefurs, please!" said the scientist. "We have plenty of time for finding out who's responsible for what!"

"Can we contact with this Professor Lingen?" asked a general.

The meerkat shook his head. "Probably an alias. After all, this was a top secret research, that officially marked as a failure. Professor Lingen can be a person or a group, dead or alive, we don't know."

"What happened to the caterpillar?" asked another scientist. "The one they used for testing?"

The meerkat adjusted his glasses and looked into his papers. "It's final measurement was 10 feet 2 inches in height and 50 feet 10 inches in length, more than 300 times bigger than its original size. Whenever they managed to shrink it back or had to... khm, exterminate, is not mentioned in these papers."

The mother sobbed louder.

"How big is Subject A?" asked the scientist again.

"HIS NAME IS ALEX!" yelled the father, making everyone shiver in the room.

The meerkat looked on the charts. "Based on the satellite images, Sub... Uhm, Alex's current size, matching to a standard pose standing on his four feet, is 2 miles 31 feet in height, and 5 miles 231 feet from head to tail. Comparing to his original size, that's more than a five-thousandfold growth. His steps already cause earthquakes of magnitude 6.2 measurable all across the continent. And nothing indicates that he cannot grow bigger, especially nearby electric sources."

A small thud indicated that Laura fainted. Two people helped her up and escorted her to the medical bay.

"So, we have to keep a 2 mile tall child, who didn't even listen to his own mother even at lesser sizes, far from any electricity, which is by the way occurs everywhere on the planet," snorted the general.

"I know it sounds like doomsday has upon us, but we have hope. We still can find the kidnappers with a bit of luck, and with them the missing machine. By examining it we might be able to stop and reverse the growth. But, according to the files, Professor Lingen built another prototype, which was transported to Warehouse 51. Yes, the super secret military building where all the failed experiments end. And please don't start arguing that it does not exist! Neither a growth ray, yet here we are with a 2 mile tall dragon kid roaming through the country like a playground!"

Silence fell to the room. The general lifted the phone to make a call.

The meerkat nodded. "Let's hope they find it, and it is a WORKING prototype."
11122121221312112211.title: They finally figure out his trigger - time to w...

choices: Alex is missing his morning bath. Into the ocean!
The kid is sleepy. The desert seems a nice, warm place
He heads toward the next mountain range
111221212213121122111.content:
Everyone was listening to the general speaking on the phone.

"Yes. Yes. Uhm. Project J.U.M.B.O, assigned technical leader Professor Lingen. Yes, I'm waiting..." The general frowned and wiped the sweat from off his chin. Then he suddenly smiled, and nodded rapidly. "Good! Transfer the box to here immediately, top priority! I want that thing ready for testing in 20 minutes!" He put down the phone and looked up. "They found it."

Cheers and applaud filled the room, many let out a deep sigh. The general cleared his throat. "Uhm, well, we don't know for sure what they found. They only managed to fetch a large crate signed by Lingen, and when they peeked into it there was a large, mostly metallic device with lots of wires and stuff. We can only assume that it's a copy or an other version of the size ray. We do not know how it functions, whenever it is operational, or even if it's capable of shrinkage."

The meerkat scientist nodded. "Still, a promising start point! I put together a team in the meantime. We will reverse engineer the crap out of it!"

Then he looked up, and stared one of the monitors. "What is happening out there?"

On a wide screen live broadcast footage, which was probably made from miles, was the massive child, who already crossed half the country just by walking. The camera zoomed in, and many dots became visible, scattered around his head, shooting even tinier dots at his thousand feet long face.

"Oh, that," said the general nervously. "I ordered the air force to... make certain protective measures to guide Subj... Alex, away from the major cities."

"You are shooting at my boy?!" asked the mother with a high pitched voice.

"Don't worry, it does not hurt him. His skin is thicker than the door of a bank vault. Maybe even thicker than an entire building. But it seems he thinks of them as annoying bees protecting their nests, so he turns to a different direction."

"He had an accident with bees when he was little," said the father. "So, as much as I don't approve these methods... I guess it's fine..."

"You are shooting at my boy!" screamed the mother again. The father hugged him strongly.

"Madam," said the general, "you should be glad that I managed to pull this off. Some of the countries considered to launch a nuclear attack on him, considering he has the potential of a total catastrophe on a global level, bigger than all our previous wars combined!"

"What?!" asked the meerkat indignantly. "A nuclear attack?! That would be disastrous! We cannot be sure how his body would react! He can explode, or he can explode IN SIZE just as well! Did they not see what happened at the power plant?!"

"That's what I tried to explain them," said the general. "But you know, they are politicians. They have a... different set of mind."

"Excuse me!" said a senator, but no one listened to him.

One of the hobby scientists scratched his head, looking at another screen.

"Uhm... Doc? Why are... khm... why are those numbers changing?"

Everyone looked at the aforementioned monitor. Those were the numbers which showed the sizes of different parts of Alex. Height 11,230 feet, legs 5143 feet, paws 2315 feet, tail 17,238 feet, and so on.

And each and everyone was increasing slowly.

"Oh, crap," said the meerkat with a pale face. "That's what I feared. His body is reacting to the atmospheric electricity."

"Is he growing again already?!"

"Yes," nodded the scientist, "at a relatively slow pace, for now. I would say one percent per minute. But this means if we won't be able to do any counteractions, he will be..." he closed his eyes for a moment for a mental calculation, "3.6 miles tall in an hour. 12 miles in three hours... And in twenty hours he can be the next person who touched the Moon, and probably the last one as well. And that's ONLY from a constant one percent per minute growth!"

This time the mother fainted.

=====================================

Alex hated the bees. They stung him a couple of months ago, and it hurt really bad. These ones were buzzing around his nose, and no matter how hard he tried, he couldn't shoo them away. And they were everywhere - each time he wanted to see a 'micro scaled' city from closer, they appeared.

"Alright, alright! I get it!" he said with an annoyed voice. "You nested inside the toys, you filthy insects!" He then lowered his head; he was not supposed to use curse words.

At the fourth city, he had enough. He laid down on his belly, and covered his eyes with his palm. His hind legs stretched across the landscape for miles, erasing corn fields and a pine forest, while his midsection squeezed a series of unfortunate roadside shops hundred feet deep into the ground. He giggled as he sank further into the soft land. Even in this position his snout was way higher in the air than the city skyline.

He peeked through his fingers. "If I want to look at these toys, I will look at these toys!"

The 'bees' attacked more aggressively. Alex tried to blow them away, which he managed to do in some cases. Little did he know that while he was busy with the fight, his arm and elbow inched closer to the city, hoarding up tons of dirt in front of the city into a pile bigger than the buildings. At the same time his hind paws crawled through a highway bridge, ploughing it up; the toes broke the construction like a tiny toothpick...

Just before the the increasing mass of pile reached the edge of the city, Alex stood up, leaving a gargantuan draconic shaped crater behind. "Okay! Fine! I'm leaving!" He then looked around where can he go. Where can he get rid of these annoying insects?
111221212213121122111.title: They find the other growth ray

choices: No time for experiments, they attempt to shrink Alex immediately
They accidentally enlarge someone else
Both size rays fire at the same time - the result is catastrophic...
1112212122131211221111.content:
The moment has arrived. They carried the sealed box into the test laboratory of Fort Werington, where the meerkat scientist and his carefully selected team were waiting. The officers grabbed the crow bars, and opened the crate up.

Inside was a bunch of smaller boxes, a drawer closed with a padlock, and the most curious machine the meerkat had ever seen. It looked like the crossing of a magnified laser gun and a Tesla coil, mounted to a stand. Wires of all sizes and color were hanging around, and on its side was a panel with a series of buttons. A pointy end, most probably the muzzle, was looking at the meerkat directly, who gulped nervously, and took a step back.

"Okay, gentlemen." He turned to his colleges. "We don't have much time. Let the experiments begin!"

=====================================

Alex looked around, and when he noticed the big lake not far from him, he smiled.

"Bees hate water! And I also missed my morning bath." The gigantic child stretched his limbs, yawned, and headed toward the water - which was actually an ocean, but to him was just a lake, similar to that he visited a couple of weeks ago with his family.

It took only a minute to reach the shores miles away from his original location. When he stood next to the water, he accidentally stomped on an entire village of fishers, who fled into the water just before the massive paw landed on their wooden houses. Alex didn't even notice.

"Ah, the breeze!" he sighed, and took a deep breath, swallowing a flock of birds without realizing. The nearby airplanes detected a slight turbulence, and they changed course immediately to avoid the giant kid.

Alex put his toe into the water. "Brrrr! Cold!" Then he clenched his jaw, and marched into the ocean. His action immediately caused a smaller tsunami, as he sent a series of waves dozens of feet high on their way. The other villages became flooded a few seconds later.

As he moved forward, he wondered why is this lake so shallow, as it only reached his ankles at first. He wanted to submerge entirely, but the ocean was simply not deep enough at this part. So he moved along, carefully placing his paws to avoid sinking too deep into the surprisingly soft bed. The water dwellers swam away as fast as they could. They couldn't comprehend what was happening around them, they only saw a monstrous creature flattening their homes, the corals, the nests, the caves, everything; leaving nothing but a stirred pile of mud behind.

Eventually the ocean became deeper, and Alex felt his body slowly submerging more and more. First the level of the water reached his legs, then his belly, then his neck. After a few more minutes, he was able to puddle in the water, happily playing and swimming around. Ocean liners were swept aside, they traveled miles against their will.

What Alex didn't notice was the collection of Cumulonimbus - storm clouds - piling up above his head. He thought the rain was nothing but a shower, the drops were so tiny it felt like a water cooling spray.

Moments later the kid did not, but the entire world observed the strange phenomenon of the clouds turning from dark and gray to blue. They were glowing like a Christmas decoration; sparks jumped around, the growling sound intensified...

...Until a lightning struck the giant dragon boy with a deafening thunder.

Alex gulped in surprise, he stopped paddling, and immediately submerged into the ocean. His frame became blurry to the satellites that kept an eye on the giant kid constantly; they only saw a dark, draconic shape underwater. Then this shape lit up in blue as well, and right after it started to grow.

The blurry figure stretched wider and longer, like a drop of ink spreading in a glass of water. The huge waves on the surface didn't help to establish its speed or size either, but it was clear that the already mind boggling sized dragon gained more and more mass and volume by the second.

Alex couldn't understand what was happening; his muscles tensed, and first the surface above his head moved further, then closer, then further again as he sank deeper - until his legs hit the bottom of the ocean. From that, his head skyrocketed upward, and seconds later he broke through the surface.

Based on his 10 thousand feet long head they finally managed to approximate his overall size, which was close to 4 miles in height, but Alex was still growing. A 4000 feet wide neck followed, then his shoulder broke through sending even bigger waves, then the majority of his vast body emerged like a submarine.

Finally, at around 6 miles in height, his head smashed into the clouds, turning them into a gust of rain immediately. His recent size increasing halted.

"Someone must have pulled the plug," the supermassive kid blinked, looking around at the now shallower ocean.
1112212122131211221111.title: Alex is missing his morning bath. Into the ocean!

choices: Lisa's new favorite toys: the electric cables!
Different machine - different trigger
Alex's arrival interrupts any further testing
11122121221312112211112.content:
Thomas had a really stressful day. Not only there was this whole situation with the ever-growing dragon child, which led to the evacuation of entire cities; but the green skinned anthro lizard was also selected into the group of scientists who worked on the dissection of the growth ray - the brother of the machine that caused all this trouble. And on top of all that, he couldn't find a babysitter who could watch over his little girl, Lisa.

Buses, coaches, helicopters, military and police trailers, conveyance vehicles - everyone was busy moving to a safe location. Luckily there were plenty of shelters built during the previous wars, located inside nearby mountains or deep underground, but the evacuation process was still a complete mess and chaos. Finding a person who can keep an eye on her 3 year old girl in these times was almost as impossible as finding a needle in a haystack. And Thomas was divorced with no friends, his ex-wife lived the opposite side country, so he couldn't call anyone to take the job.

Thus, Thomas had no choice but to bring Lisa into the top secret facility of Fort Werington. He had to sign up some extra papers, but still it was hard to pull it off. After all, it's hard to convince a 3-year old to keep her mouth shut about the existence of a building.

"Be a nice kid and play alone," he said, placing her on a carpet in one of the empty conference rooms. He brought a few of her favorite toys, but he doubted it would engage her attention for hours. But he really had no choice. As he left to the elevators leading to the deeper parts of the facility, he informed the guard that her child is in the room. The guard nodded, then sat down on front of the monitors, with a cup of coffee in his hand.

Thomas pushed his entry card to the side of the elevator, and when it confirmed his ID, he also used the retina scanner.

"ACCESS GRANTED," said a machine voice. The lizard sighed, and he pushed the lowest button on the panel, where the growth ray was currently located. His hands were shaking; he had a feeling that the fate of the world rested on his shoulder.

As he predicted, the green skinned, 3 feet tall bipedal anthro lizard girl got bored pretty quickly. The conference room was dull, with only a big round table, some chairs and a turned-off TV. She only had a few toys, but she already knew them - and this place seemed new! Papa never brought her to his workplace, and with any kid in her age, she was curious. She slowly walked to the big door, and with all her strength, she leaned toward it and pushed open.

Right then the most unfortunate event happened. Normally it would not have been a big deal, but the timing was disastrous. The guard accidentally knocked his coffee over, and the hot liquid poured into the consoles.

"Oh, sheet!" he growled, and turned away to grab a paper towel.

Lisa was not paying attention to him, she found the elevator more interesting. When she got there, she did her favorite play, namely randomly pushing buttons. A machine voice constantly repeated, "ACCESS DENIED. ACCESS DENIED. ACCESS D..." Then a frizzle sound, "ACCESS GRANTED." The door of the elevator opened.

The guard was constantly swearing as he tried to dry up the spilled coffee. He was too busy thinking about the trouble he caused rather than his surroundings.

Inside the elevator, Lisa pushed the only button she could reach, the lowest one.

"Ah, sheet!" she repeated the guard's word. "I am too small!"

The elevator hummed and moved downward with great speed.

When the doors opened again, Lisa heard a bunch of adults speaking and yelling and arguing.

"No, that cable goes there!", "Where is the test object?!", "These documents are not updated!", "Did you hear that he is already 6 miles tall?!", "We all gonna die!", and so on, endlessly. She also heard her father explaining something to a meerkat, who shook his head angrily. Everyone seemed really stressful.

Lisa didn't want to bother the adults, she learned that it's better to leave them when they are angry. But she was curious, especially when she noticed the huge shiny toy gun in the middle of the room. So she hid inside a nearby crate with an open side that had a good view through its cracks. She even closed the back of the crate, although she had to fiddle it with her tiny claws for a few seconds.

"Anthony!" yelled a meerkat scientist, probably the boss around here. "Can you summarize what Group B achieved so far?"

"Yes, sir!" A zebra assistant looked into his notes. "Shrinking inanimate objects, success. Re-enlarge them, success. Growing inanimate objects, success, shrinking them back, success."

"Good. Basically it works. We now conduct our most important test - can an object of living cells be enlarged and then shrunken back? Bring something we can put this thing on!" said the meerkat, and Lisa saw two anthro panthers grabbing her crate. She put her handpaw on her mouth to force herself quite. "Perfect. We place the test object on top of it. Yes, Thomas, the apple! Right. Set the machine to organic growth. I don't want a giant crate to squeeze us!"

"A giant apple is better?" Lisa heard his father, but his voice was shivering more than usually.

"Don't be so cynical, Thomas! We start with a power level of one percent. If anything goes wrong, we shoot immediately with the shrink settings. If that fails, we use the Disintegrator. If THAT fails, everyone knows the evacuation procedure, right? Okay, let's start!"

Lisa wanted to crawl out, but she was paralyzed. What happens when her dad finds out she climbed inside? She can be in a big trouble! So she waited instead, silently, hoping that no one detects her presence.

She saw the people moving away from her crate. One person put an apple on the top, then he retreated as well behind the safety glasses. Lisa had a clear view on the giant toy gun towering in front of her, its muzzle pointed downward, right at the crate.

"Countdown! Five! Four!"

Lisa had a bad feeling about this.

"Three! Two!"

She gulped hard, placing her tiny paws at the side of the crate.

"One! Push the button!"

The toy hummed up, its end glowed up red - and then it fired a laser beam, which engulfed the crate entirely. Lisa shivered, warmness filled her body, her stomach rumbled. It was strange but pleasurable at the same time, like a tickling. She tried her best not to make a single noise.

Then the process ended and the machine turned off.

"No change so far, sir. According to the numbers, not a hundredth of an inch."

"Sergej! Use the taser!"

A bear approached the apple with shivering limbs. He almost fell, but he managed to get close to the apple, and pushed a small black box into its size. He pushed a button, and a small spark ran into the apple... Then he jumped back in fear...

...But nothing happened. The apple's skin became a bit darker where the taser touched it, but that's all.

"Hmm, negative," said the meerkat. "Interesting. Repeat the process! This time increase the power to five percent!"

The machine hummed again, and the laser shot her again, this time causing a bit stronger tingling. Lisa let out a giggle, but no one noticed.

Again, the apple stayed the same even after the taser test.

"Again! More power!"

They repeated the process with ten percent, then again with twenty percent, then fifty percent, then one hundred percent. The last one caused the laser beam glowing so bright it blinded everyone, and they yammered all over the place. The machine was humming so loud it shook the glasses. Lisa growled as the tingling this time was more like an itching, burning sensation. When the machine stopped, this time with a pop and some smoke, she knocked the back of the crate out, and with slight dizziness, she crawled where she suspected the elevator should be. But instead she managed to get into the next room, which was a giant storage with different equipment, boxes, chemical sets and so on.

By the time everyone gained their eyesight back, she was no where to be seen in the room. The apple, still the same size, rolled onto the floor innocently. The growth ray was smoking, indicating its malfunction of overusage.
11122121221312112211112.title: They accidentally enlarge someone else

choices: Thomas tells them what is happening
Dad is overprotective - pull the fire alarm and try to shrink back Lisa alone!
No time to answer - Lisa has a massive growth spurt!
111221212213121122111122.content:
The meerkat scientist looked through the research papers and reports they found in the drawer next to the machine.

"I don't get it. Did we missed something?" He picked up the apple, and examined it carefully. Except some burn spots it looked like a perfectly normal and boring fruit. Even its smell couldn't revealed anything. "The inanimate objects changed their size, that is for sure. So it IS a size changing machine. And we definitely hit the target."

"I found a clue that there are some slight differences between the two versions of the growth ray," replied Anthony, the zebra assistant, holding up another pile of papers. "It seems that this was the first prototype, but it was very hard to activate the molecule-enhancing quantum waves within living cells. That's why the second machine was built, where the activation was provoked by electric potential difference. But that turned out to be WAY TOO powerful, so they canceled the project..."

"Yes, yes, we know," replied the meerkat with a sigh. "Does this mean if we hit Subject A with this ray, we need to use this other kind of trigger to make him shrink?"

"We can assume sir, but we need more tests."

The meerkat shook his head. "Do we know ANYTHING about this trigger?"

The zebra looked into the papers, reading thoroughly. His eyes moved back and forth, and he mumbled the words. Then, after a minute, his eyes brightened. "Found it! It seems that they tested the machine on numerous living creatures, and only one showed an incrementation in size. It was a non-sentient pet snake, who grew right after..." his eyes narrowed, "quote, produced a semi-autonomous, convulsive expulsion of of air by sternutation. End quote."

The meerkat tilted his head. "You mean, sneezed?"

=====================================

The storage room was cold and dark. It reminded Lisa to their basement at home, which was also filled to the brim by various stuff. Papa never let her down there alone, and she was never-ever allowed to play with the toys. Maybe that's why her heart beat so fast now. She was all alone in this storage room, surrounded by literally tons of interesting things. Vials here, tiny machines there, mysterious boxes everywhere. She almost applauded out of joy, but then she remembered, maybe she shouldn't be here.

Being a curious child, rather than turning around and leave, the young lizard girl started to play around. She grabbed a random equipment, and hit another thing with it, then she threw that away and grabbed another stuff. She constantly giggled, toying with wrenches, an old microscope, cans, without recognizing the the true purpose of these items. She built a doll house out of tubes, then used wooden model figures as actual dolls.

Then she noticed the real prize. Up on a shelf was a plush unicorn, one that she always desired but never got. The lizard girl threw everything else away, and toddled toward the toy. The problem was that it was way up above her head, even an adult would found difficult to reach it without a ladder.

"I wish I were bigger!" she sighed. Then she looked around, and found a bunch of old cardboard boxes. With all her strength she pushed them to the base of the shelves. Using her tiny claws to climb and her tail for balance, she carefully climbed up. When she was on top of the pile, she reached out for the unicorn - but the cardboard scaffolding proved to be too weak for a tumbling child, and the pile collapsed. Lisa fell back with a scream, right into another pile of boxes. Moreover, the first stock of boxes collapsed onto her, stirring up a lot of dust around.

Lisa sat up, she panted as her nose emerged from the ruins. Her heart was racing, and she gasped for air, only to gulp down a handful of the dust. Her nose tingled, and she felt the familiar irritating sensation in her nasal cavity.

"Aaaah... Aaaaah..." she took a deep breath. "Aaaaaaaahhh..." Despite her effort to remain quiet, she couldn't hold it back anymore.

"Aaaachoooo!"

Her sneeze blew most of the dust away. She sniffed, and blew her nose to a paper towel she found. Then she tried to sit up - but her suddenly shivering body didn't let her.

"Wha..." she blinked rapidly. Something felt odd. Her body rumbled as if she was cold, but the temperature didn't drop. On the contrary, she felt a warmness spreading from her stomach, similarly when the laser beam hit her earlier.

Then the room started to change, or she thought so. Previously only her head was out of the pile, now her shoulders freed up as well. The boxes moved further a bit, then again, until her waist became visible too. Her legs pushed the ruins back, while her tail peeped out on the back. The lower shelf, which was previously at eye level, descended.

"Am I... growing bigger?" she gasped, and covered her mouth with her paw-hand excitedly. Just like that dragon boy, who became a giant! She saw him on television, and thought that was the coolest thing happened to anyone. She was so envy! Daddy told her 'it is just a cartoon', but she knew the difference between a morning cartoon and those usually boring news her dad watches on evenings.

She already climbed from 3 feet to 5 feet tall, although she didn't know that. All she knew is how the room changed around her, shrinking smaller, inch by inch. Then another shiver ran through her, blowing her up to 7 feet. The boxes flew over, and her tail knocked a desk, and started pushing an old chair further.
