Lisa suspected she became taller than most of the adults. She tried to stand up, but it was hard to find her balance from the sudden change of perspective, and with a thud she fell back on her bum. Then another growth spurt attacked, making her 10 feet tall - more than three times of her original size.

"Auch," she said with a deeper voice, rubbing her rump. Her limbs started to squeeze the furniture, boxes and equipment fell to the ground, causing a lot of noise of metal clunking and glass shattering.

"What is happening in there," she heard the voice of the meerkat. "Thomas! Find out who's causing a mess in the storage!"

Lisa tried to double over to look smaller, which was just as ridiculous as it sounded. She put a piece of cardboard onto her head, which looked more like a hat than an actual cover.

Then the door opened, and her dad entered the room - only to see his 'little angel' being not so little. They were on the same eye level. And she was sitting on a pile of junk!

The lizard scientist shrieked, while her daughter waved with his paw-hand. "Hi, dad!" she used her innocent voice, which sounded more intimidating since it became deeper. "Look! I grew up, just like you told I will if I eat my vegetables!" Then a growl erupted from her stomach, and her body quivered. All of a sudden, she gained 5 more feet in height, turning her into a 15 feet tall lizard girl. She had to bend her legs as her paws reached the shelves, and her tail knocked the wall behind her. Now she actually had to look DOWN to her father. "And look! I'm still growing bigger! Are you happy?"

"Thomas!" she heard the meerkat again, this time with a more inpatient tone. "Report me! What the hell is happening there?!"
111221212213121122111122.title: Different machine - different trigger

choices: Thomas forgot to change the machine's settings - it's still on growth!
A big sneeze is coming up, knocking over the machine
The machine overheats and blows up - Thomas will grow too!
1112212122131211221111222.content:
Alex considered himself clean enough. He couldn't find any deep part anyway, at least not without loosing sight of the shores. And his parents always told them not to go too far into a lake.

So the 6 miles tall dragon child climbed out, not noticing that his 7000 feet long paw prints pointing outwards were three times as big as those who pointed inwards. He simply thought those are the prints of some wild animal.

Like a wet dog he shook his vast body to get rid of the water, causing a massive but short rainfall in the neighborhood. Still, droplets big enough to fill entire swimming pools fell from time to time, smashing into the ground and carving craters on impact.

Then the most horrifying sound emerged - his stomach growled from hunger, similarly to an ignited rocket. Alex looked to his left, then to his right, but he couldn't see any exit doors. Only a seemingly infinite carpet of various colored patches and some piles of dirt - actual mountains - surrounded him, and the big lake behind him. He frowned, trying to remember how he arrived at this strange room anyway; but it was all fuzzy and confusing.

"Mom? Dad? Laura?" he get no answer. Even the buzzing helicopters were too small and too quiet for him to notice. He felt alone, and hungry. "Is breakfast ready?" he asked, placing a paw on his growling stomach. Then he chose a random direction, and with massive, earth quaking thuds, set forth to search some food.

Evacuated villages disappeared under the gigantic soles. The toes pressed and compressed trees like toothpicks under a road roller. The swinging tail smashed any cloud that wanted to form, leaving a road-like path on the sky. Alex thought it was just a thin fog at chest level. For a moment he forgot his hunger, and played with the thin, white layer of atmospheric formations. He reached into them with his front paw, almost catching an airplane that accidentally got too close to the gigantic child. At the last moment it managed to fly through the 1000 feet long toe-claws.

And all these time his scales and skin contacted with all kind of electricity: utility poles, underground power lines, transformers, atmospheric charges... They were relatively small to trigger a major growth spurt, but little by little they contributed to a constant size upgrade. 31,500 feet of height became 31,700... 32,000... 32,500...

=====================================

Thomas was petrified. His mind became hyperactive, trying to comprehend what just happened. Here she was, his little angel, his only child... Who were a bit small to her age... Now probably the second biggest sentient creature on the planet.

Somehow, despite all the security measures, she got down here. Somehow, despite all the watching eyes, she got affected by the machine unnoticed. And somehow... No, there is no more somehow. She grew bigger, because she was caught in the growth ray! And probably multiple times...!

"Thomas!" the meerkat brayed. "Don't make me go inside!"

The lizard scientist gulped. He didn't want his child to become a test subject. Who knows what that meerkat wants to do with her once he figures out her size?! No, no, no, the best solution is to shrink her back as fast as possible, without anyone noticing...

"T-there is nothing here, sir!" he yelled with a shivering voice. "Just some... boxes fell! Let me clean it up!"

"Right so. But hurry up, we need to hold a brainstorm!"

Thomas closed the door quietly, then turned to his not-so-small child, who was still sitting in a squeezed position, and smiling at his dad.

"Honey... Did you..." he coughed. "Did you got hit by the... laser beam? Earlier?"

Lisa nodded, the cardboard hat fell from her big head. "Yeah! I was hiding in the crate!"

Thomas facepalmed. "And I assume... you climbed here after that... Did you happen to sneeze by the way?"

"Now that you mention it, I did!" Lisa nodded again. "Why?"

"Nothing... Just curious..."

"Do you like me this big?" asked the lizard girl, and she wagged her tail happily, wiping the side of the walls.

"Uhm... Sure...! It suits you. But uhm, we don't want you to grow any bigger, right?"

"Like that Alex boy? He is so handsome!" she giggled.

Thomas looked around. He need to get rid of his colleagues AND make her kid climb back to the room where the machine was. Judging by her size she would barely fit through the door.

Then he noticed the fire alarm. Without further hesitation, he pulled the trigger. A loud siren was heard all of a sudden, and red lights turned on everywhere.

"Oh, crap!" he heard from outside of the door. "Quick, grab the research papers! Evacuate the building! Hopefully it's only a drill... Geesh, the worst time possible...! If I grab the person who is responsible for this...!"

Thomas gulped. He waited for a minute, then opened the door slightly. No one was in the room. They grabbed the most important stuff, but the size ray - it was still sitting in the middle.

"Okay, honey! I need you to climb back here! Through the door, please."

"Okay, papa," Lisa said, and she fiddled to turn around. She managed to get herself into a crawling position - couldn't stand up anyway because of the ceiling anyway. Still her limbs and tail knocked into the furniture constantly, stirring up a great amount of dust. "I feel like in those playground tunnels!" she chuckled.

"Okay, honey, try to climb out, while I start up the machine," said Thomas and he ran out of the storage room. With the numerous levers and buttons, he managed to aim the nuzzle at the door, where Lisa's head popped out.

The lizard girl inched forward, but her shoulders stuck between the doorframes. She pushed harder, her toes carved the wooden floor, but she couldn't move more.

"That's right honey, stay where you are!" said Thomas and he pushed the fire button. The machine whirred up, it's nuzzle glowed in red - but some smoke erupted from numerous holes as it was still hot from the previous usages.

"I can do it, papa!" replied Lisa, and he banged her body no the doorframe. Cracks appeared on the wooden structure; inside more equipment fell. Dust and soot flew everywhere.
1112212122131211221111222.title: Dad is overprotective - pull the fire alarm and...

choices: Lisa's growth slows down - she is stuck underground
The machine blows up under Lisa's paw - a massive growth spurt is coming!
Alex notices a "tiny" lizard head bursting through the ground
11122121221312112211112222.content:
Sam, the anthro cat kidnapper was driving nervously, while his partner, Henry, listened to the radio with a wide grin.

"...We were informed by the officials that they are working on a solution to bring back the giant child, known by the name Alex, to his former size," said a female reporter. "The exact details are considered to be classified, but they promised a solution within one hour. Meanwhile, the current location of the giant is North Kennton - if you are currently in that region, it is mandatory to seek shelter in the designated safety area; follow the instructions of your local safety officer. The child's current size is over 6 miles in height, and 17 miles in length from head to tail. Do NOT try to contact with the giant, he is unable to hear even an industrial speaker. A team of engineers are building a device to make a two-way communication possible..."

"Over 6 miles!" Henry laughed. "Who knew that this thing has such a great potential?" He pointed at the back, where the size machine was strapped onto a trailer.

It was Sam's idea to finally leave the warehouse behind. When they heard the kid's stomach-rumble, he really frightened by the thought that they might end up in the belly of a gargantuan dragon. So he managed to convince Henry to grab some junk food any kid would love - burgers, a bar of chocolate, a bucket of ice cream, - and go near the kid together with the growth ray to give him an extra large happy meal. However, Henry did not want to hear about using the machine to shrink the kid back.

"Did you check our bank account?" he replied to Sam when he mentioned the possibility. "Do you see any 7 digit number? Or even 6? Hm? 5? How many dollars we have?"

"Twenty..." Sam gulped, "Twenty-two."

"Twenty-two billion?" asked Henry sarcastically.

"No, just... Twenty-two dollars."

Henry nodded, and leaned back in his seat. "So, there is no benefit to shrink him back. We informed the parents, so now their kid is their responsibility. Just like before, if you ask me!"

Sam nodded, then he suddenly twisted the steering wheel and slammed on the breaks. The car and its trailer slipped, sliding back and forth before he managed to stop it.

Before their eyes the road disappeared into a massive hole. It was about an entire mile in diameter, and so deep that a cathedral could fit together with its towers. It seemed like an entire new valley, just without any flora or fauna: only dirt and rocks formed its bottom and the walls. If they had been able to see it from high above, they would have seen the shape of a draconic paw print.

This was the first time Henry's face turned white.

"I might reconsider my previous opinion on the subject," he whispered.

=====================================

Lisa fidgeted more, feeling the door frame will give up very soon. She was still determined to squeeze herself through, just like his father instructed to. However, her movements caused more damage behind her, and all the dust burst through. Lisa coughed as she swallowed a great amount.

"Aaaaaahh..." she twitched her nose. "Aaaaaaahhh..."

"No-no-no-no," gasped Thomas. "Hold it in, dear!"

"I'm... trying..."

The glow of the machine's nozzle intensified - then it sparked, and faded right after. The humming noise ceased.

"No! No, you stupid piece of crab!" yelled the lizard scientist, and he kicked into its metallic side, without any result. The machine was overheated.

"Aaaaaahhhh!" Lisa took a deep breath, but that only caused to swallow more scatter of particles. "Caaan't... hooooold..." Her left eye tweaked from the effort.

Thomas tried one last desperate attempt to turn back the machine, then his fright took over and he ran toward the elevator in panic.

"AAAAACHHOO!"

The sudden blow of air tipped the machine over, and pressed Thomas to the door.

"AAAAACHHOO! AAAAA.....CHHOO! AAAAAH... AAAAH.... AAAACHHOOOO!"

The last one felt more like a hurricane; everything that was able to move in the room flew toward the opposite wall; some of them smashed, some cracked, some chipped. The machine slid on its side as if it was on ice.

The following rumble coming from Lisa's body shook the walls.

"Papa..." she whispered with tears in her eyes.

"Sorry, dear...! I... come back later!" replied Thomas as he hopped into the elevator and pushed the up button.

Right after the door closed, Lisa's body gone haywire. She shivered so violently the lizard girl became unable to speak. She only managed to moan as she finally burst through the door frame, exploding its parts to splinters. With a few blind moves she managed to drag herself into the middle of the experiment room. Lisa thought here she has some room to grow, but the next single spurt falsified her hopes: with a sudden spurt she grew all up to 50 feet tall, forcing her to stand on four and still hit all four walls with her limbs and the ceiling with her head. Then another shiver ran through her, and her back smashed into the upper level. Her vast, bulging tail broke the walls behind here like cardboard and destroyed everything in the storage room.

As there was no other room adjacent to her current location, she couldn't stretch her still growing legs - the only way to avoid being squeezed by the shrinking walls is to stand up. And so the 70 feet tall lizard girl slowly get back on her feet, breaking more and more levels with her head. And still her fantastic growth went on; 100 feet of height, 120 feet, 150 feet... The entire structure rumbled and quaked, windows shattered even above the surface.

Thomas only felt the elevator shaking more and more aggressively.

"What have I done..."
11122121221312112211112222.title: A big sneeze is coming up, knocking over the ma...

choices: The plan works, but consuming the still growing food makes Alex bigger too!
A satellite camera catches the ray - the kidnappers get caught!
Alex notices the growing food, but someone else grabs it before him...
111221212213121122111122222.content:
At least a hundred people gathered together in the wide open area in front of Fort Werington. They all discussed the situation of the alarm, whenever it was real, a prank, a drill, or a sabotage. The fire brigade arrived quickly, since the facility, being a secret military base, had its own fire department. They hastily jumped off the trucks, and ran toward the entrance of the main building, when Thomas suddenly appeared as the last person, running outwards.

"Back!" the lizard scientist bellowed, waving with his hands. "Everyone, move back, before sh..."

Suddenly the earth quaked heavily. Thomas fell, but he quickly jumped up and ran further from the building.

The earthquake intensified, shaking the windows of the five stories high concrete building. Cracks ran through the walls, the glass shattered on various spots, debris fell and smashed into the ground. The crowd screamed and backed from the facility, which piece by piece started to collapse. A large piece of the wall almost hit Thomas, but the lizard managed to avoid being flattened in the last second.

A few moments later the once impressive building fell apart like a house of cards, the concrete dropped like a curtain, revealing an enormous green scaled snout. The snout alone was dozens of feet long, pointing upwards; the dining table sized nostrils widened and narrowed - then it rumbled, and the entire thing ascended further up, demolishing more of the already ruined building. A giant lizard head appeared above the surface, and tilted forward. The eyes, each as big as storefront windows, focused on the crowd in front of them.

"Hi!" said Lisa with a gentle smile. She blinked, then her immense body shivered and blew even bigger, making her shoulders free from the shrinking prison.

Thomas gasped. Judging by the size of her head, her "little angel" was close to 500 feet tall, if not already surpassed it.

"Hi... Honey..." he waved feebly. Many persons screamed or fainted, the firefighters slowly backed - they were used to the situation where they had to rescue children from tightly squeezed places, but not on this scale.

The meerkat scientist grabbed Thomas's shoulder.

"Thomas...! Do you know this... person?"

The lizard gulped. There was no use to deny.

"She... is... my daughter."

"What the hell is she doing here?! And... how did she end up this big?!"

"I ate all my vegetables!" replied Lisa, still smiling politely.

Thomas quickly summarized the situation with a weak voice. He constantly had to clean his sweating forehead, and his hearth was pounding in his ears. He saw that the meerkat wants to choke him to death right there and then, but it was definitely a bad idea in front of his giant kid.

"I can't believe it! Of all the persons we could enlarge, it had to be another uncontrollable child!"

"I am not uncontrollable!" replied Lisa with a bit of anger in her voice. "I am well behaved! Papa always told me!"

"Right... So, where is the growth ray anyway?"

"That funny little gun?" asked the giant girl. "I think I feel it between my toes!" She fiddled a bit, despite the loud objection of the scientists. Suddenly her face turned pale. "Ups... I think I broke it."

"YOU DID WHAT?!"

Lisa wanted to reply, but then her entire body glowed in red. Her head seemed like a light bulb, turning everything into crimson color nearby. She opened her eyes widely, then her nose twinkled...

"AAAAACHOOOOOOO!"

The mother of all sneezes blew the crowd and the debris yards away, people rolled on their sides. When they looked up, they saw the giant girl shivering...

Then the earthquake returned.

"No-no-no-no-no!" cried Thomas. "She will grow bigger! Quick, everyone, into the cars! Get away! She's gonna..."

With a thundering crash Lisa's colossal body exploded higher, her stomach ascended above the ground level. The 700 feet tall kid growled as the underground parts became too tight for her; she leaned forward, placing her massive hands on both sides of the fleeing crowd. She panted, then tightened her muscles as another growth attacked, blowing her up to 900 feet. At this point she decided it would be better to climb out of the sinkhole she was trapped in. By lifting up her leg, her knee broke through the ground, sending house sized chunks flying all across the place. With a thud, she managed to place one of her paws on the ground, leaving a hundred feet long print where the previously full parking lot was set. Miraculously, everyone managed to get away from the growing giant, who was satisfied not to smash anyone so far. As she managed to free his other leg, another growth spurt hit, sending her up to 1200 feet.

Her paws alone were bigger than the facility's surface ruins, not to mention her celestial pillars of legs, her swimming pool sized belly, or her tail competing with airplane hangars.

Lisa stood on four, and leaned closer to the convoy of buses, trailers, SUVs and cars. "Sorry, people! I always wanted to grow big, but I think I broke a few of your stuff... Can you forgive me?" She bat an eyelid as if she just broke a vase of flowers, not an entire military base and its surroundings. As her gigantic head approached the seemingly ant sized convoy, the dirt they stirred up on the road found their way into the giant nostrils. Lisa tilted her head back, taking a few deep breaths.

"Aaaaah... Aaaaaaah..."

Thomas and the others pressed the accelerator of their cars to the floor.

"AAAAAAACHHHHOOOOOO!!!"

The vehicles temporary turned into airplanes.

=====================================

By the time Sam and Henry managed to catch up with Alex, the ginormous kid was already closer to 7 miles in height due to the various sources of electricity. The massive dragon youngling tried to eat numerous mountains that looked like mole cakes, but none of them tasted good or seemed edible. He was sitting in front of his latest place of destruction, spitting out a chunk of dirt and forest.

"I'm hungry!" Tears appeared in his eyes, ran down on his cheeks, and started new rivers once they hit the ground.

"Don't worry, kiddo, help is on the way!" mumbled Sam to himself. Henry sighed, then asked a critical question.

"That's fine if we plug the growth ray into the generator. But how do you want to boost the food so big? I guess our car battery is enough for a size doubling, maybe tripling. But his teeth are bigger than our entire trailer!"

Sam pointed to the left, where a mile away was a set of high voltage overhead power lines, right behind the giant dragon's rump. Alex's mountain sized tail cut the line - and the landscape - in two, but a series of blue colored sparks were still visibly jumping onto the house sized scales, fueling his growth bit by bit - indicating that they were still powered.

Henry shrugged. "Be my guest!"

Sam turned the wheel, and they went off road. The trailer jumped up and down as they drove through the lands, including circling around another mile-wide paw print. Luckily Alex stayed in one place, as he was getting tired searching for breakfast.

Ten minutes later they arrived at the foot of the power lines. Sam got out of the car, and he shivered as he looked up at the massive tail. It was truly a sight to see, a mountain of smooth draconic scales; it seemed more like a futuristic building of some giant alien race rather than anything mundane. And it constantly moved, billowed, and slowly expanded, feet by feet.

"Hurry!" he said to Henry, who moved a bit slow. He thought it would be better to leave the kid hungry, but he knew it would drive Sam crazy. So he went to the growth ray, and plugged it into the generator they brought, while his partner placed the basket of food at the bottom of the electricity pole.

"Ready?" Sam asked.

"Ready!" replied Henry, and he aimed at the basket. Then he pushed the button.

The machine whirred up, the nuzzle glowed, and the familiar ray hit the food, engulfing it in a crimson color.

1112212122131211221111222221.content:
The basket, being non-organic, started to grow right away. It rattled, then doubled its size, then doubled again, growing to the diameter of a dinner table. However, the food inside remained the same.

After a minute, Henry turned off the growth ray. The basket was still rumbling, blowing to bigger sizes, now closer to a car in dimensions. It looked like a piece of modern art people can see in public parks.

"So... Do you want to go there and kick-start the food?" asked Henry. Sam scratched his head, thinking how to get close to the giant basket, when the solution presented itself: the bowl shaped container, now resembling a swimming pool, reached one of the transmission towers. The blue sparks jumped down, and rolled toward the bottom of the basket, hitting the pile of food.

The burgers instantly gained an additional 2 feet in diameter, then to 5 feet, enough for entire family for days. The chocolate bar broke under their combined weight, then the pieces blew up to the size of a bed, knocking the burgers over, but then they took over in size... The bucket of ice cream rose up like a newly born tower pulled from the ground. It all seemed like a race, which food can be named as the new Guinness world record. The basket get affected as well, providing more and more space to the increasing pile of calories.

"Let's get out of here," said Henry when the shadow of the basket reached them. It was already 50 feet tall, and its growth was only accelerating. By the time the two kidnappers get into the car, the tower of consumables reached 100 feet in height, only to double their size to 200 feet.

"Yeah, I guess it will be enough soon," said Sam, looking back at the ever-growing meal. More and more sparks jumped from the power lines, and he had to drive as fast as possible if he wanted to avoid getting flattened beneath the world's biggest buns.

"How they are growing so fast?" asked Sam. "None of our treasures became this big in such a short time!"

"I might increased the power of the growth ray to maximum," replied Henry. "You said that we have to hurry..."

The skyscraper sized burgers grew to 500 feet. The rumbling basket, now the size of a stadium, sent earthquakes, and then it doubled its size again. Due to its weight it started to sink into the ground, but also ploughed up a good portion of dirt around it. The sides inflated with the speed of a train.

"Yeah... I'm sure Alex notices it in no time. Such a big kid needs a lot of protein!"

Alex indeed noticed the basket of food when it hit his rears. The colossal dragon kid looked back, and saw the burgers, chocolate and ice cream bucket - half a mile tall each -, and smiled happily.

"Breakfast!" he said, and wagged his tail, almost smashing the kidnappers. Luckily the gap between the scales were big enough for the car to get through.

The massive dragon slowly stood up and turned around. To his even greater joy the pile of food rumbled, and doubled its size yet again. Alex leaned closer and smelled them, then nodded contentedly. He opened his cave sized mouth to swallow the entire thing with a single gulp, when the basket suddenly grew up to 2 miles.

"Oh, wow! They are growing!" mumbled the dragon kid. "I wonder if they will keep growing in my belly!" and with a few loud munching, the gargantuan amount of meal vanished in the dark tunnel of throat.

Alex let out the largest, air-resonating, deafening burp. He patted his stomach, and felt pleased.

"See how happy he is!" said Sam, still driving away from the scene with maximum speed, "He can go playing with the world again while we wait for the..."

He couldn't finish his sentence because a temblor, much more intense than anything before, shook the landscape. A growling sound of rumble ran back and forth between the mountains - the kidnappers had to put their hands on their ears, it sounded like a rocket launch next to them.

"What is happening?!"

Sam looked back and almost drove the car into a rock.

The ginormous dragon kid's stomach glowed in red, then as the blue sparks ran up on his skin, lighting the scales in blue, they grew in size until they became hundreds of feet wide themselves. When the line of lights reached Alex's stomach, they vanished with a loud pop. Alex, the 7 miles tall dragon kid shivers so heavily the whole country felt it - and then he started to grow bigger.

"WHAT?!" asked Sam, but he couldn't watch the scene. He managed to reach an intact part of a highway, and he sped up - but it was still nothing comparing the speed of Alex's growth. Instead of dozens of feet, he gained thousands in mere seconds, and then an entire mile...

Alex let out another earth quaking belch that lasted for half a minute, and then he blew to 10 miles in height. His legs tormented the landscape further, creating new valleys and mountains as the immense amount of dirt and earth chunks were reorganized under the bulging body. Alex blinked a few times, then he shivered, and grew to 12 miles, only to climb up to 15 miles... His entire length was matching with the big cities, the clouds only reached his ankles. His weight was so humongous even the tectonic plate sank a few millimeters deeper, causing some minor volcanic activities hundreds of miles away.

When the monstrous sized kid reached 20 miles, the shivering - and the growth - finally ceased.

Alex stretched his limbs, and rubbed his belly.

"Oh, boy! I feel full," he said with a deep, resounding voice. He looked around. The patches on the "carpet" shrank even smaller, the mountains seemed like little bumps. The horizon in the distance curved slightly.

"This room is becoming stranger and stranger..."

Just some growth shenanigans with two kidnappers, who plan to kidnap and grow a child to huge size with a found growth ray in order to get some big ransom. However, they are not scientists, and the child might grow beyond their control...

PLEASE DO NOT ADD CHAPTERS TO MY LAST ONE, as I want to continue to write the story till the very end, and you don't know which path I want for myself. However, you are free to add any chapters that continues a previous one.
I reserve the right to delete a chapter if it's the same path I intended to use!

Some other rules:

- Growth is preferred (but if you want to write about shrinking, go ahead).
- Avoid 18+ parts, no explicit scenes (lesser kinks are allowed).
- DON'T write too short chapters, please! Aim at least 10 sentences.
- ALWAYS check for grammars! I know mine is not perfect, but at least I try.
- I reserve the right to edit, add, or delete any submissions.

Tease from the first chapter:


"Sam, you are a genious!" said one of the anthro cats. He wore a black suit, a ski mask, and a flashlight. His partner in crime, who wore a similar outfit, smirked.

"I know, right, Henry?"

Both of them were standing in the middle of an abandoned warehouse, way outside the city, in the middle of a forest. It seemed the building was forgotten a long time ago, judging by the amount of dust and lack of stock. Hanry found it accidentally when he was searching for a location to hide their treasure they looted over the years: golden neclaces, jewels, all kind of stuff.

At first, the two criminals thought the warehouse was completely empty. As Sam looked around, using the weak light of the flashlight, he saw nothing but empty shelves, desks, and junk all over the floor.

"It's perfect!"

Henry nodded, and he took a step further into the darkness - until he found something big in the corner.

"What is it?" he asked, walking to the unusually big pile. It turned out was a big machine with a pointy edge, like a gigantic drill machine. He looked at the control panel, and just out of boredoom, he fiddled with the buttons.
